---
title: "OLS and Elastic Net"
author: "Erica"
date: "2026-03-11"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Preparation
```{r, echo = False}
# load libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(glmnet)
library(caret)
library(lubridate)
# load data
df <- read_csv('data/final_data.csv')
df <- df %>%
  mutate(caldt = as.Date(caldt),
         year = year(caldt)) %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  drop_na()
# predictor matrix
feature_names <- df %>%
  select (- alpha_ann, - crsp_fundno, - caldt, - year) %>%
  colnames()
# storage
results <- list()
# initial window
years <- sort(unique(df$year))
start_year <- years[1]
initial_train_end <- start_year + 9
df <- df %>%
  arrange(year, crsp_fundno)
# count observations
obs_count <- data.frame()
```

## Main Loop
```{r}
for (t in (initial_train_end + 1) : max (years)) {
  train_full <- df %>%
    filter (year >= start_year & year <= (t - 1))
  test_data <- df %>%
    filter (year == t)
  if (nrow(test_data) == 0) next
  # 70/30 split for tuning
  tune_years <- sort(unique(train_full$year))
  split_index <- floor(0.7 * length(tune_years))
  train_years <- tune_years[1:split_index]
  valid_years <- tune_years[(split_index + 1):length(tune_years)]
  train_tune <- train_full %>% 
    filter(year %in% train_years)
  valid_tune <- train_full %>% 
    filter(year %in% valid_years)
  X_train <- train_tune %>% 
    select (all_of (feature_names)) %>% 
    as.matrix()
  y_train <- train_tune $ alpha_ann
  X_valid <- valid_tune %>%
    select (all_of (feature_names)) %>%
    as.matrix()
  y_valid <- valid_tune $ alpha_ann
  
  # ols model
  ols_model <- lm(
    alpha_ann ~ . - crsp_fundno - caldt - year,
    data = train_full
  )
  pred_ols <- predict (ols_model, newdata = test_data)
  
  # enet tuning ()
  alphas <- seq (0, 1, by = 0.1)
  best_rmse <- Inf
  best_alpha <- NULL
  best_lambda <- NULL
  for (a in alphas) {
    cv_model <- cv.glmnet(
      X_train,
      y_train,
      alpha = a,
      nfolds = 10
    )
    lambda <- cv_model $ lambda.min
    preds <- predict (cv_model, newx = X_valid, s = lambda)
    rmse <- sqrt(mean((y_valid - preds)^2))
    if (rmse < best_rmse){
      best_rmse <- rmse
      best_alpha <- a
      best_lambda <- lambda
    }
  }
  
  # refit elastic net on expanding window
  X_full <- train_full %>%
    select(all_of(feature_names)) %>%
    as.matrix()
  y_full <- train_full $ alpha_ann
  enet_model <- glmnet(
    X_full,
    y_full,
    alpha = best_alpha,
    lambda = best_lambda
  )
  X_test <- test_data %>%
    select (all_of(feature_names)) %>%
    as.matrix()
  pred_enet <- predict (enet_model, newx = X_test)
  
  # store predictions
  temp <- test_data %>%
  select(crsp_fundno, caldt, alpha_ann) %>%
  mutate(
    pred_ols = pred_ols,
    pred_enet = as.numeric(pred_enet)
  )

  results[[as.character(t)]] <- temp
  
  # count 
  obs_count <- rbind(
    obs_count,
    data.frame(
      year = t,
      train_obs = nrow(train_full),
      valid_obs = nrow(valid_tune),
      test_obs = nrow(test_data)
    )
  )
}
```

## View Reults
```{r}
results
```

## Observation Counts
```{r}
obs_count
```
